'''zokayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackish|quackish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackish|quackish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zokayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zokayithi|zokayithi]] || [[word:zokayiji|zokayiji]] || [[word:zokayishi|zokayishi]] || [[word:zokayiki|zokayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zokayuthuthu|zokayuthuthu]] || [[word:zokayujuju|zokayujuju]] || [[word:zokayushushu|zokayushushu]] || [[word:zokayukuku|zokayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zokayuthu|zokayuthu]] || [[word:zokayuju|zokayuju]] || [[word:zokayushu|zokayushu]] || [[word:zokayuku|zokayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zokayufthuf|zokayufthuf]] || [[word:zokayufjuf|zokayufjuf]] || [[word:zokayufshuf|zokayufshuf]] || [[word:zokayufkuf|zokayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zokayethe|zokayethe]] || [[word:zokayeje|zokayeje]] || [[word:zokayeshe|zokayeshe]] || [[word:zokayeke|zokayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zokayothotho|zokayothotho]] || [[word:zokayojojo|zokayojojo]] || [[word:zokayoshosho|zokayoshosho]] || [[word:zokayokoko|zokayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zokayotho|zokayotho]] || [[word:zokayojo|zokayojo]] || [[word:zokayosho|zokayosho]] || [[word:zokayoko|zokayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zokayofthof|zokayofthof]] || [[word:zokayofjof|zokayofjof]] || [[word:zokayofshof|zokayofshof]] || [[word:zokayofkof|zokayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfthÃŸf|zokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfjÃŸf|zokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfshÃŸf|zokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfkÃŸf|zokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zokayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zokayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zokayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zokayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfthÃŸf|zokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfjÃŸf|zokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfshÃŸf|zokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfkÃŸf|zokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfthÃŸf|zokayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfjÃŸf|zokayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfshÃŸf|zokayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zokayÃŸfkÃŸf|zokayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zokayÃḊthÃḊ|zokayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zokayÃḊjÃḊ|zokayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zokayÃḊshÃḊ|zokayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zokayÃḊkÃḊ|zokayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zokayathatha|zokayathatha]] || [[word:zokayajaja|zokayajaja]] || [[word:zokayashasha|zokayashasha]] || [[word:zokayakaka|zokayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zokayatha|zokayatha]] || [[word:zokayaja|zokayaja]] || [[word:zokayasha|zokayasha]] || [[word:zokayaka|zokayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zokayafthaf|zokayafthaf]] || [[word:zokayafjaf|zokayafjaf]] || [[word:zokayafshaf|zokayafshaf]] || [[word:zokayafkaf|zokayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zokayasha|zokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zokayshÃḋsha|zokayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zokayrosha|zokayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zokaymusha|zokaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zokayasha|zokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozokaynkshÃḋsha|gozokaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozokaynkrosha|gozokaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozokaynkmusha|gozokaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozokaynkyasha|gozokaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zokakayasha|zokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zokakayshÃḋsha|zokakayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zokakayrosha|zokakayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zokakaymusha|zokakaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zokakayasha|zokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozokakaynkshÃḋsha|gozokakaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozokakaynkrosha|gozokakaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozokakaynkmusha|gozokakaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozokakaynkyasha|gozokakaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zekÃḊyasha|zekÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zekÃḊyshÃḋsha|zekÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zekÃḊyrosha|zekÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zekÃḊymusha|zekÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zekÃḊyasha|zekÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozekÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gozekÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozekÃḊynkrosha|gozekÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozekÃḊynkmusha|gozekÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozekÃḊynkyasha|gozekÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zokfayasha|zokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zokfayshÃḋsha|zokfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zokfayrosha|zokfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zokfaymusha|zokfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zokfayasha|zokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozokfaynkshÃḋsha|gozokfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozokfaynkrosha|gozokfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozokfaynkmusha|gozokfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozokfaynkyasha|gozokfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
